prompt: A high-quality cinematic food commercial showcasing a crispy fried chicken burger inspired by KFC. Close-up shot of golden crunchy fried chicken fillet being placed inside a soft sesame bun, layered with fresh lettuce, creamy mayonnaise, melted cheese, and pickles. Slow-motion burger assembly with dramatic lighting, steam rising from hot chicken, crispy texture details, and sauce dripping. The camera rotates around the burger on a dark premium background. Fast cuts of fries and cold soda splashing with ice cubes. Bold red and white branding-inspired colours, energetic commercial vibe, ultra-realistic 4K, shallow depth of field, food photography style, appetizing, and luxurious atmosphere.
